description: Default capability for the main window. Grants `core:default` (Tauri's built-in core APIs) plus `core:window:default`. Note: app-defined commands registered via `tauri::generate_handler!` (get_db_info, list_items, seed_test_pack) are not constrained by capability ACL in Tauri v2 unless an explicit per-command permission file is added; they are reachable from any window with frontend IPC enabled. Sprint 5 will tighten CSP and add a per-command permission manifest before v1.0.
